Stay ahead of resets.

- CodexBar shows your session and weekly usage windows (plus credits where available) directly in the menu bar. - No Dock icon, minimal UI, and all parsing stays on-device. + CodexBar keeps your session + weekly windows (and credits where available) in the menu bar, so you never have + to guess when you’re safe to ship.
